entities.name: MULTINUTRIENT DEFICIENCIES
entities.description: The lack of multiple essential nutrients required for plant growth and development

entities.name: RAINFED AGRICULTURAL PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: The measure of agricultural output in systems that rely solely on rainfall

entities.name: SOIL
entities.description: The natural resource consisting of the upper layer of earth in which plants grow

entities.name: WATER
entities.description: The essential liquid resource required for plant survival and growth

entities.name: VEGETATION
entities.description: The plant life present in a particular region or ecosystem

entities.name: PRODUCTION SYSTEMS
entities.description: The organized framework of resources and methods used for agricultural output

entities.name: AGROECOSYSTEM
entities.description: An ecosystem managed for the production of food, fiber, or other agricultural products

entities.name: RAINFED PRODUCTION SYSTEMS
entities.description: Agricultural production systems that depend on precipitation for water supply

entities.name: WATER SHORTAGE
entities.description: The deficiency of water available for crop needs

entities.name: STRESS
entities.description: The physiological or environmental pressure exerted on plants due to adverse conditions

entities.name: SEMIARID TROPICAL REGIONS
entities.description: Geographic areas characterized by low rainfall and high temperatures

entities.name: SOIL INFERTILITY
entities.description: The inability of soil to provide sufficient nutrients for optimal crop growth

entities.name: CROP PRODUCTION
entities.description: The process of growing crops for agricultural yield

entities.name: PRODUCTIVITY ENHANCEMENT
entities.description: The process of increasing the yield or efficiency of agricultural production
